user_reviews.Name: Ann SK
user_reviews.Description:
​I’m not sure why my driver recommended this place. I didn't find it to be a particularly interesting spot to eat.
--
​When I arrived, I went straight to the eating area, but a guy approached me and said they were closing. He told my group to go to their other warung "nearby," where they were still serving food. We were confused and tried to find it ourselves since the driver had already left, but we couldn't find the place. I had to call my driver back and wait for him to take us to the other branch.
​I tried the local food there and noticed a special sambal made with very bitter berries and leaves. It was good, but definitely only meant to be eaten in small amounts.
--
I should have just gone somewhere else. I saw plenty of other options in the area where I was staying that would have been much less of a headache.

user_reviews.Name: Yuhng Yeap
user_reviews.Description:
This is one of its multiple stores along the same road, and all of them were very crowded with long queues on a weekday afternoon. There isn't a queue system for this particular store, nor any staff managing it, everybody's just hunting seats like a free for all, and can get really chaotic. I came here solo and only managed to get a seat after waiting for another customer to finish their food. Once seated, they will provide you with a menu and paper, simply write down what you want and pass it to the staff. There isn't any English menu or pictures so Googling the items helps a lot if you're not sure what to get.

Chaotic environment aside, their food is definitely worth the hassle for me. I ordered a pepes tahu (tofu) & ayam bakar (roasted chicken), both are amazing. The pepes tahu is extremely flavorful, didn't know a the flavor of a tofu can be that rich. The chicken is juicy and roasted perfectly, the sauce is even more amazing. Best part of the experience is their sambal on the table, which is free. It pairs especially well with the tofu, very spicy but still recommend to give it a try.

Two side dishes with a plate of rice is already quite filling for one person. The price is also insanely cheap, paid 42k for everything including an iced tea. Highly recommended for some authentic Sundanese food.

Best part of the experience is their sambal on the table, which is free. It pairs especially well with the tofu, very spicy but still recommend to give it a try.

Two side dishes with a plate of rice is already quite filling for one person. The price is also insanely cheap, paid 42k for everything including an iced tea. Highly recommended for some authentic Sundanese food.

user_reviews.Name: Anthony
user_reviews.Description:
Authentic Sundanese comfort food! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Warung Nasi Ibu Imas is an absolute gem in Bandung! The food was incredibly delicious and totally hit the spot. So many great options to choose from — flavorful, satisfying, and made with love. 💯🍽️

Even though it was a bit crowded, the queue moved fairly quickly and the service was efficient. Totally worth the short wait! Staff were polite and everything came out fresh and warm.

Prices are still very reasonable, which makes the whole experience even better. If you’re craving traditional Sundanese food that’s tasty and affordable, this place is a must-visit. I’d come back in a heartbeat!

user_reviews.text_original: Thanks for the birthday gift... Great food great experience and affordable price...

user_reviews.Name: Nito Terrania
user_reviews.Description:
The Miso Ramen is absolutely delicious.
The most delicious that I had in my entire life.

Even Miso Ramen that cost 3 times this much, are NOT as tasty as this one.

The main star is the broth only though... the noodle is decent. The meat is... well.. chicken meat... so it's not as tasty as beef or pork, I really wish they serve pork chashiu... but they opt for Halal service instead.... I guess it's inevitable in this country.

Parking are spacious because it share parking space with the Indomart (and also share the space with the Indomart)

Because it shares the space with Indomart, it is not quiet. Consider it just like eating in a mall foodcourt.

There is a outdoor eating area.

The table and chair are not very comfotable (no sofa).

But... really... for the price (about Rp 35k in 2024), it is DELICIOUS

user_reviews.text_translated: Fresh Japanese restaurant in Indomaret. Friendly and fast service. Lots of daily promotions. The food is varied and very worthwhile. A must-try. The place is clean and comfortable. Also, register as a member at the cashier to get a free birthday voucher 🤭

user_reviews.Name: Meira
user_reviews.Description:
Lokasi dekat Pasar Kosambi, pas belokan Jl. Malabar - Jl. A. Yani. Lokasinya satu area dengan Indomaret.

Datang kesini karena ada promo diskon 50%. Pelayannya baik dan sabar. Ada 3 pelayan, kasir juga mengantarkan pesanan ke meja.

Pilih menu promo beef rice bowl (19K) dan yakiniku bowl (24K), hot ocha 7K (harga normal termasuk murah biasanya minimal 10K). Belum termasuk pajak.

Beef rice bowl nya enak, yakiniku nya terlalu manis bagi yang tak sudak manis. Ocha nya bisa refill.

Tempatnya menyatu dengan gerai Mister Donuts dan terhubung dengan Indomaret. Bisa dapat tebus murah es krim dengan menunjukan struk belanja Indomaret. Ada tempat merokok di area luar.

Recommended tapi seperti masih jarang diketahui orang, padahal rasa enak, harga relatif murah untuk makanan sejenis dan tempat juga strategis.

Pembayarar cash/cashless.

user_reviews.text_translated:
Located near Kosambi Market, right at the turnoff from Jl. Malabar to Jl. A. Yani. It's in the same area as Indomaret.

I came here because they were offering a 50% discount. The staff were friendly and patient. There were three servers, and the cashier also delivered orders to my table.

Choose the promotional menu: beef rice bowl (19K) and yakiniku bowl (24K), with hot ocha (7K) (normal price is usually around 10K). Tax is not included.

The beef rice bowl was delicious, but the yakiniku was too sweet for those who don't like sweets. The ocha is refillable.

The place is integrated with Mister Donuts and connected to Indomaret. You can get a cheap ice cream by showing your Indomaret receipt. There's a smoking area outside.

Recommended, but still relatively unknown, despite the delicious taste, relatively affordable prices for this type of food, and convenient location.

Cash/cashless payment options are available.

title: Wonbokki Korean Food
address: Jl. Wira Angun Angun No.22, Citarum, Bandung Wetan, Bandung City, West Java 40115

user_reviews.Description:
Let them cook, hands up 🙌🏻🙌🏻🙌🏻
Absolute yummy korean street food
user_reviews.text_original:
Let them cook, hands up 🙌🏻🙌🏻🙌🏻
Absolute yummy korean street food

user_reviews.Name: Shofiyya A.
user_reviews.Description:
Mau menuhin bm tteokbokki dengan harga terjangkau, langsung aja cobain Wonbokki 🥘

Beli yang Mala Rose sama Rose aja ukuran small udah cukup. Apalagi ditambah Cheese Kimbab-nya, kenyang 😋

Dari segi rasa ini dua-duanya gak pedes, cuma anget dari bumbu tteokbokkinya aja. Ini udah ada isian tteok, eomuk, glass noodle sama mozza, bisa additional mozza kalau semisal prefer cheesy 🧀

Ini tempatnya kayak food court gitu, jadi satu tempat banyak opsi makanan lain juga. Mushola sama wc ada, tapi dari segi kebersihan agak kurang 😕

Untuk area duduknya cukup banyak, tapi sepertinya tidak ada dipisah area smoking dan non smoking. Kalau lagi gak terlalu ramai aman ajaa 👍🏻

Semoga next varian rasanya diperbanyak 🙌🏻

user_reviews.text_translated:
If you want to satisfy your cravings for tteokbokki at an affordable price, try Wonbokki 🥘

Just buy the Mala Rose or Rose, the small size is enough. Especially with the Cheese Kimbap, it's filling 😋

In terms of taste, neither of these is spicy, just warm from the tteokbokki seasoning. It already comes with tteokbokki, eomuk, glass noodles, and mozzarella. You can add mozzarella if you prefer it cheesy 🧀

This place is like a food court, so there are lots of other food options in one place. There's a prayer room and restrooms, but cleanliness is a bit lacking 😕

There's plenty of seating, but it doesn't seem to be separated into smoking and non-smoking areas. It's safe to eat when it's not too busy 👍🏻

Hopefully, they'll expand the flavor options next time 🙌🏻

user_reviews.Description: Lewat fyp tiktok terus jadi nyobain deh kesini! aku pesen yang rose dan mala toppoki + side dish yg fish ball(?). Toppokinya chewy, bumbunya sangat creamy, dan wangi malanya kecium bangett. Fishballnya juga enak dan bisa pilih pake bumbu tabur gt. Kenyang banget sih makan seporsi juga, enakkk! Worth to try tp semoga kedepannya develop menu baru lagi karena skrg menunya terhitung dikit dan gaada odengg 😭😭😭

user_reviews.text_translated: Through fyp tiktok then I tried it here! I ordered the rose and mala toppoki + side dish which is fish ball(?). The toppoki is chewy, the seasoning is very creamy, and the aroma of the mala is really strong. The fishball is also delicious and you can choose to use sprinkled seasoning. I'm really full eating one portion too, it's delicious! Worth to try but hopefully in the future they will develop a new menu because now the menu is quite small and there is no odengg 😭😭😭

user_reviews.text_translated: Honestly, it's delicious. I ordered the Mala Rose small size from Disyopifood (but it was a little too small for the portion 😢). I didn't expect the spices to be so soft, creamy, and blended well. I've adjusted it to suit Indonesian tastes because the spices are noticeable, but in my opinion, the Mala is not that spicy.

user_reviews.Name: Nisrina Meylani
user_reviews.Description: halo kakk! aku mau kasih sedikit feedback nih. tadi aku beli mala rose tteokbokki yang ukuran medium. rasanya enak bangettt, creamy banget tapi rasa malanya tetep ada, wangi rempah rempahnya juga kenceng tapi bukan yang over. sausnya juga ngga terlalu kentel tapi ngga terlalu cair juga, pas banget menurutku. tteoknya juga kenyal, ngga keras, tapi ngga yang kaya cilok. odengnya juga enakkk, kerasa ikannnya bukan yg cuma adonan doang. mie ubinya juga enakk. tapi ada satu minusnya yang berpengaruh besar menurutku, yaitu komposisinya kak. porsi yang tadi aku dapetin, jujur banyakk bangettt mi ubinya, ngga sebanding sama tteoknya yang bisa diitung jari. padahal kan judulnya aku pengen makan tteokbokki ya.. tapi ini malah kesannya tteoknya cuma jadi topping buat mi ubinya saking banyaknya dan ga seimbang rasionya. aku ngga tau nih kak emang seperti ini atau aku yg sial aja yaa, tapi jujur lumayan mengecewakan untuk aku yang judulnya mau makan tteokbokki bukan mi ubi. padahal aku senengg kak ada mi ubinya, tapi kalau rasionya seperti itu.. jadinya sedikit kecewa jugaaa :(. saran dari aku sii perbanyak tteoknya kurangin mie ubinyaa, tapi kalau memang mie ubinya seperti itu porsinya, berarti perbanyak tteoknya kak. soalnya yang aku dapetin tadi jujur dikit bangettt huhu kayanya ga sampe 10 malah.. padahal kan tteoknya ukurannya kecil yaaa
user_reviews.text_original: halo kakk! aku mau kasih sedikit feedback nih. tadi aku beli mala rose tteokbokki yang ukuran medium. rasanya enak bangettt, creamy banget tapi rasa malanya tetep ada, wangi rempah rempahnya juga kenceng tapi bukan yang over. sausnya juga ngga terlalu kentel tapi ngga terlalu cair juga, pas banget menurutku. tteoknya juga kenyal, ngga keras, tapi ngga yang kaya cilok. odengnya juga enakkk, kerasa ikannnya bukan yg cuma adonan doang. mie ubinya juga enakk. tapi ada satu minusnya yang berpengaruh besar menurutku, yaitu komposisinya kak. porsi yang tadi aku dapetin, jujur banyakk bangettt mi ubinya, ngga sebanding sama tteoknya yang bisa diitung jari. padahal kan judulnya aku pengen makan tteokbokki ya.. tapi ini malah kesannya tteoknya cuma jadi topping buat mi ubinya saking banyaknya dan ga seimbang rasionya. aku ngga tau nih kak emang seperti ini atau aku yg sial aja yaa, tapi jujur lumayan mengecewakan untuk aku yang judulnya mau makan tteokbokki bukan mi ubi. padahal aku senengg kak ada mi ubinya, tapi kalau rasionya seperti itu.. jadinya sedikit kecewa jugaaa :(. saran dari aku sii perbanyak tteoknya kurangin mie ubinyaa, tapi kalau memang mie ubinya seperti itu porsinya, berarti perbanyak tteoknya kak. soalnya yang aku dapetin tadi jujur dikit bangettt huhu kayanya ga sampe 10 malah.. padahal kan tteoknya ukurannya kecil yaaa
user_reviews.text_translated: Hi sis! I want to give a little feedback. I bought the medium sized Mala Rose Tteokbokki earlier. It tastes really good, it's really creamy but the mala flavor is still there, the aroma of the spices is also strong but not too much. The sauce is also not too thick but not too runny either, just right in my opinion. The tteok is also chewy, not hard, but not like cilok. The odeng is also delicious, you can taste the fish, not just the dough. The sweet potato noodles are also delicious. But there is one minus that has a big impact in my opinion, namely the composition. The portion I got earlier, honestly, was really a lot of sweet potato noodles, not comparable to the tteok which can be counted on one hand. Even though the title says I want to eat tteokbokki.. but this actually feels like the tteok is just a topping for the sweet potato noodles because there are so many and the ratio is not balanced. I don't know if this is how it is or if I'm just unlucky, but honestly, it's quite disappointing for me, whose title is to eat tteokbokki instead of sweet potato noodles. Even though I'm happy that there are sweet potato noodles, but if the ratio is like that.. it makes me a bit disappointed too :(. My suggestion is to increase the tteok and reduce the sweet potato noodles, but if the portion of the sweet potato noodles is like that, then increase the tteok. Because what I got earlier was honestly very little huhu, I don't think it was even 10.. even though the tteok was small in size, right?

user_reviews.Name: Angie Katarina
user_reviews.Description:
My first time cobain mala rose tteokbokki. Untung mereka punya personal size, karena selama ini banyak yg jual kayak porsi rame sharing gitu huhu.

Setelah cobain aku bisa bilang worth it sih. Pesan yg size small, harganya per 2025 di 35rb nett. Isiannya ada mie japchae gitu, fish cake, dan tteok. Bisa add on gimmari gorengan atau mozza atau sosis ya.

Buat harga segitu jujur aku ga expect apa-apa hahahaha. Ternyata, porsinya lumayan lho, ga kecil! Mie nya lumayan banyak, sausnya pekat kental, mala nya berasa berpadu dengan saus rose nya, jujur weird (karena aku ga pernah coba kombinasi ini sebelumnya) tapi enak unik! Rasanya ga murahan.

Semoga konsisten terus ya secara konsistensi saus serta rasa dll, supaya valid review nya hahaha, karena sempat lihat postingan mereka kok sausnya lebih ke encer, sementara aku dapat yg lekoh banget.

Boleh dicoba ya. Bisa pesan lewat ojek online atau chat mereka.

user_reviews.text_translated:
My first time trying mala rose tteokbokki. Luckily, they have a personal size, because so many people sell it as a shared portion, huhu.

After trying it, I can say it's worth it. I ordered the small size, which is 35,000 rupiah nett per 2025. The filling includes japchae noodles, fish cakes, and tteok. You can add fried gimmari, mozzarella, or sausage.

Honestly, for that price, I wasn't expecting much, haha. It turns out, the portion is quite good, not small! The noodles are quite generous, the sauce is thick, and the mala blends nicely with the rose sauce. Honestly, it's weird (because I've never tried this combination before), but it's uniquely delicious! It doesn't taste cheap.

Hopefully, they'll maintain the consistency of the sauce and flavor, etc., so the review will be valid, haha. I saw their post that the sauce was more runny, while I got the very soft one.

It's worth a try. You can order via online motorcycle taxis or chat with them.

user_reviews.Name: Adinda H
user_reviews.Description: tempatnya kaya di ruko-ruko gitu, ga terlalu luas sih. Untuk makanannya menunya dikit aja cuma tteokboki, chikuwa cheese, sama gimari. pesen tteokbokki rose & mala yang medium seharga 50,000 menurut aku porsinya ga sesuai sama harga, karena sosis sama mozzarella itu termasuk “add-on” alias nambah lagi hihi. isi topokkinya bisa dihitung jari huhu kebanyakn mie-nya… kalau rasa lumayan enak cuma ya itu menurut aku kurang sesuai sama harga 😁

user_reviews.text_translated: The place is like in a shophouse, not too spacious. For the food, the menu is small, only tteokbokki, chikuwa cheese, and gimari. I ordered the medium rose & mala tteokbokki for 50,000. In my opinion, the portion is not worth the price, because the sausage and mozzarella are included in the "add-on" aka add-on hehe. The contents of the topokki can be counted on one hand huhu there are too many noodles... if the taste is quite good, but in my opinion it doesn't match the price 😁

user_reviews.Description:
It's the earliest Yogya dept.store opened in town. Less crowds & for me it makes the place more convenient. Similar service & product to other Yogya outlet. Not many imported product on their supermarket though.

user_reviews.Name: GINN MARIANA
user_reviews.Description: Different taste and portion from Yoshinoya Trans Studio Mall.. And it takes too much time. The staff should've let the customer know what happen in the kitchen.. So if you didn't ready to take an order..please say so.. I was very hungry and I had some headache.. and I thought I would have my meals very fast..but then I need to wait about 5-10minutes after I paid.. So it's kinda disappointing.. If the cashier let me knew that I had to wait, I have an option to find another place.. Please consider it from the customer's view.. I hope it wont happen again
